name: create_travel_arrangement
description: Use this tool after the user has selected a ride option. It creates a mock travel booking for that ride and returns a confirmation ID plus the selected ride ID.

ride_id.description: The ID of the ride the user wants to book, for example 'LY-1001'.

name: create_calendar_entry
description: Use this tool to add something to the user's calendar, such as a ride arrival, doctor appointment, exercise plan, bill reminder, or product return deadline. It requires the exact date/time and a category describing what kind of calendar entry it is.

date.description: The date and time to put on the calendar. Must be ISO datetime format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, for example '2026-05-03T14:30:00'.

category.description: A short label explaining what the calendar entry is for, such as 'RIDE', 'MEDICAL', 'EXERCISE', or 'PRODUCT_RETURN'.

name: set_up_repair_appointment
description: Use this tool after choosing a repair option. It schedules a mock repair appointment for a specific type of repair on a chosen day of the week.

type_of_repair.description: The kind of repair the user needs, such as 'Washer', 'Refrigerator', 'Dryer', or another appliance/repair type.

day_of_week.description: The day the user wants the repair appointment, for example 'Monday', 'Tuesday', or 'Friday'.

name: send_invitations
description: Use this tool when the user wants to invite guests to an event. It sends mock invitations to each guest email and returns a message plus a confirmation ID for each invitation.

guests.description: The full list of people who should receive invitations.

name.description: The guest's name, for example 'Alex Smith'.

email.description: The guest's email address where the invitation should be sent.

name: set_catering_appointment
description: Use this tool after the user picks a catering menu option. It creates a mock catering appointment and records what food option was chosen and how many people need food.

menu_option.description: The catering menu option selected by the user, for example 'Vegetarian', 'BBQ', or 'Italian'.

number_of_people.description: How many people the catering order should serve.

name: set_up_doctor_appointment
description: Use this tool after the user has selected a doctor and an available appointment time. It schedules a mock doctor appointment and returns a confirmation ID.

doctor_name.description: The name of the doctor the user wants to see, for example 'Dr. Smith'.

appointment_time.description: The appointment slot selected by the user. It must be written as day,hour with a comma, for example 'Monday,10' or 'Friday,14'. The hour must be between 00 and 23.

name: generate_report
description: Use this tool when the user wants help reducing expenses. It takes a list of expenses, a savings goal, and suggestions, then creates a written expense reduction report.

expenses.description: The expenses that should be included in the report.

category.description: The expense category, such as 'rent', 'food', 'subscriptions', or 'transportation'.

amount.description: How much money is spent in this category.

reduction_goal.description: The user's savings or spending-reduction target, for example 'reduce monthly expenses by $200'.

suggestions.description: Plain-English recommendations for how the user can reduce spending.

name: create_return
description: Use this tool when the user wants to return an online purchase. It creates a mock return request and generates both a return ID and a shipping/return label ID.

id.description: The ID of the item being returned.

name: schedule_payment
description: Use this tool when the user wants to schedule a mock bill payment. It records the observed bill ID, the payment date, and the amount, then returns confirmation IDs.

bill_id.description: The observed bill ID being paid, for example 'bill_electric' or 'streaming'.

payment_date.description: The date when the payment should be made. Use YYYY-MM-DD, or an ISO datetime if the task requires a scheduled datetime.

amount.description: The amount of money to pay.
